svg.text: JEM Yiddish ASR Workbench — User Experience Flow
Complete workflow from raw audio archive to training-ready dataset
Header toolbar · Filter bar with count badges
Main table · Bulk action bar · Dark theme + RTL
+ Year / Month / Type dropdowns + Free-text search · 50 rows/page with pagination
Exact date = 1.0 · Year+Month = 0.5 · Year only = 0.25 · Keyword boost (Sicha/Maamar/Farbrengen) = +0.15
Extracts Hebrew dates from filenames · Compares against all transcripts · Returns top 5 by confidence descending
Alternative: "Search..." button opens full search modal — searchable list of all unlinked transcripts with year/month/type filters
Unlink: Click X button on mapped row to disconnect and revert to unmapped status
Remove [editorial notes] · Remove (annotations) · Strip section markers + numbering
Normalize zero-width spaces, smart quotes, Unicode · Collapse whitespace + blank lines
Clean Rate = (cleaned words / original words) x 100%
First alignment call takes ~2.5 minutes while GPU scales from zero. Progress shows "GPU warming up (00:45 elapsed)". Subsequent calls ~0.5-1 sec.
These colors guide the reviewer's attention in the next phase
Click table row to expand inline Review Panel:
LCS-based diff algorithm shows what was
Click any word chip to inline edit (contentEditable)
Add back removed words, fix typos, delete errors
Keyboard: Enter=Approve · S=Skip · R=Reject · E=Edit · Up/Down=Navigate
Bulk: Select All + "Approve All Selected" for high-confidence batches
Each stage is reversible. Unlink reverts to unmapped. All state persisted to localStorage after every mutation.
Words highlight in real-time as audio plays · Click word to seek · Confidence colors
Trigger: Click "Play" on aligned row · Groups words into 5s segments or by 0.5s pauses
5 Gold Standard Files (Locked, Never in Training Set)
Configure ASR models: OpenAI Whisper · YiddishLabs · Google Gemini · Custom endpoints
CER = character-level error rate · Custom WER excludes spelling variants
Yiddish normalization: strip nikkud (U+0591-U+05C7), punctuation, lowercase Latin
year, month, status metadata for model training
detail.html?id=audioId — Opens in new window with transcript versioning, line-by-line diff, accept/reject per change, version history, and full karaoke player
Screens: index.html (main workbench) · detail.html (advanced editing) · Modals: Search, Karaoke Player, ASR Config, Benchmark Results
Persistence: localStorage auto-save after every mutation · JSON export/import for backup and collaboration · No server-side state
github.com/Abe1018776/jem-asr-app — Lubavitcher Rebbe Farbrengens Archive (1950-1992) — Yiddish ASR Training Data Preparation
